content: i just got him so i need recomendation ^^

Hello there : )

Best way to learn is to practice. Did you check his skills and passives ? I suggest you use him in a few battle, switch teams around a bit, then come back with more specific questions : )
Just one piece of advice : he's focused on damage so you might want to support him with a shielder / healer
people said hes great with gdoll, so i need two more character that can pair with him
maybe like someone who buffs dmg amplification?
That would work great indeed, or strength stacks

Don't forget he's ultra either but doesn't requier leap, so you could use an awakener who revolves around utra space management.
Clemmy would be a great choice imo
Should i e3 saya and corposant? I also need help with setting up different teams for d-zones

Hello there : )

First off, about Corpo : yes.
You're just 1 shard away from E3 which really powers her up.

About Saya, depends. The new banner has both Pollux and GHelot who are pretty efficient dps in most teams while Saya is more niche.
If you love her style and want to play her a lot then yes, her E3 is worth the cores. If she's just a filler to you maybe E0 is enough.
I would recommand pulling at least 1 copy of her WoD though

As for your linups, here's what I would try :

- Saya-Thaïs-Aurita-Corpo 
> ( this one is not popular but I clear alert 3 with them so .. up to you )
- Tulu-Myriam-Hameln-Tawil
- Wanda-Jenkins-Celeste-Caecus
- Aigis-GHelot-Pontos-Murphy
- Lily-Faros-Sorel-Faint

I'm just baely a month old so there's obviously some tweaking to do in order minimax these teams but that should at least allow you to clear the first level of alert on each wave.

Don't forget to lvl them up though. And if you struggle somewhere, repalve you least favorite awakener on the linup by a borowwed Mouchette

Also, I notice you didn't pull for Clementine.
She's a very efficient support, you might want to give her a try.
Her E1 is a real boost, her E3 makes her more reliable if you can feed her aliemus.
